name: anonymizer
description: Detects and redacts PII (names, Aadhaar, phone, email, medical IDs) from medical documents before they are stored or shared, and flags low-confidence spans for human review.

skills.name: Anonymize medical document
skills.description: Redact personally identifiable information from medical text and flag uncertain redactions for human approval.
examples: Anonymize this report: Ramesh Kumar, Aadhaar 1234-5678-9012, seen by Dr. Mehra
Redact the patient identifiers in this discharge summary
Remove personal information before I share this prescription
